message:
feat(suggestions): Implement feedback collection and implicit signal tracking

Implements meta_skill-qlnh:
- Add SessionTracker for skill load/unload implicit signals
- Add SuggestionTracker for tracking suggestion outcomes
- Add FeedbackCollector combining both trackers with bandit integration
- Add ContextualBandit with Thompson sampling and linear features
- Add 28-dimensional feature extraction (project type, time, activity, history)
- Add reward computation from feedback signals
- Add favorite/hide CLI commands (ms favorite, ms hide, ms unhide)
- Add user_preferences table migration for persistence
- Wire FeedbackCollector to ContextualBandit for automatic updates

Acceptance criteria:
- SkillFeedback enum with all types
- SessionTracker for implicit signals
- SuggestionTracker for ignored suggestions
- CLI commands for explicit feedback
- Favorite/hide functionality
- Feedback persistence
- Automatic bandit updates on feedback
- Unit tests for feedback computation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+-- Add user preferences for favorites and hidden skills
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_preferences (
+    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    skill_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES skills(id),
+    preference_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(preference_type IN ('favorite', 'hidden')),
+    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,
+    UNIQUE(skill_id, preference_type)
+);
+
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_user_preferences_skill ON user_preferences(skill_id);
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_user_preferences_type ON user_preferences(preference_type);
